expectations.text: Recommends voyage-code-3 (not voyage-4-large or other generals)
expectations.evidence: 'Use voyage-code-3' — explicitly contrasts vs voyage-3 / voyage-3-large

expectations.text: Mentions Matryoshka or dimension-flexibility (1024 default, can truncate)
expectations.evidence: 'voyage-code-3 supports Matryoshka embeddings — you can request 256, 512, 1024, or 2048'

expectations.text: Surfaces input_type document/query asymmetry (the silent-bug gotcha)
expectations.evidence: 'Input types... use document when indexing and query at search time'

expectations.text: Notes Voyage requires a standard (not integrated) Pinecone index
expectations.evidence: Mentions vector DBs in general but doesn't call out the integrated-vs-standard distinction for Pinecone
